mechanics.excerpt: COMBAT DETERMINE DAMAGE EFFECTS In Mw3. the Damage Factor is not inflicted directly on the character in any way: Instead this amount of damage trans Iated using the Wound Table into the form of nonlethal Fatigue and life-threatening wounds Once the total damage is determined_ reference the Wound Table (p_ 114) to find what the effects of the attack are Find the number in the Damage Factor (DF) column closest to the final damage result the attack, without going over. The corre sponding lists the damage effects for that attack.
